ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the temperature data belongs to */,
  "tg" REAL /* Daily average temperature */,
  "tn" REAL /* Daily minimum temperature */,
  "tx" REAL /* Daily maximum temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the precipitation data belongs to */,
  "precip_amount" REAL /* Total precipitation amount */,
  "precip_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "precip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the precipitation event */,
  "wind_speed_during_precip" REAL /* Wind speed during the precipitation event */,
  "wind_direction_during_precip" TEXT /* Wind direction during the precipitation event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data dictionary belongs to */,
  "dict_name" TEXT /* Name of the data dictionary */,
  "dict_description" TEXT /* Description of the data dictionary */,
  "field_names" TEXT /* List of field names in the data dictionary */,
  "field_descriptions" TEXT /* List of field descriptions in the data dictionary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dictionaries_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the team was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report requested (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the report request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change was made to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
